title: synth~

messages.description: midi note messages, pitch and velocity

arguments.description: (optional) extra arguments sent to the abstraction

flags.name: -mc
flags.description: sets to multichannel output (default single channel)

methods.description: abstraction name and optional number of voices
sets number of voices (1 sets to monophonic)
non zero sets to multichannel output

body: The [synth~] object loads synth abstractions that follow a simple template. It is just a wrapper over [clone] and [mono]/[voices] but may provide some convenience, specially to newbies. One convenience is the ability to open/load different abstractions in runtime. The arguments are abstraction name and number of voices. If no arguments are given, a default and simple abstraction is loaded as a template and basis to build new synths. Clicking on the object opens the loaded abstration. Shift click opens a panel to choose an abstraction.
